title: HighRise Client
description: The Best Forge based client, that you'll never regret downloading.
body:
# HighRise Client
**1.8.9+ based client, extremely customizable utilities**

[Discord](https://discord.gg/QFwuEbESYe)

This is the best alternative to clients like Feather, Badlion etc. It is extremely customizable, and really easy to start using.

## _Some features include:_

- A launcher for the client [**(W.I.P.)**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Work_in_process)
- Badges/Icons infront of the username for who uses the client. 


## Features List
- Fullbright
- Time Changer
- Entity Culling
- Freelook
- Toggle Shift and Sprint
- Raw Mouse Input
- Zoom
- CPS and FPS Counter; and Keystrokes
- TNT Timer; and Armor HUD
- Coordinates
- Ping, Memory; and Server Address
- 1.7 Visuals
- Potion Effects
- No Hurt Cam and Particle Multiplier
- Hitboxes and NameTags
